title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | May 21, 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Chip-design company, lumpy revenue but a quarter can jump; hold with 1-2 yr view, good returns.
recommendations.detail: Chip-design company, lumpy quarterly revenue but a quarter can jump; no other such listed name; design-outsourcing tailwind (Tata, Kaynes, CG Power). Hold with a 1-2 yr / long-term view; good returns expected. Don't panic.

recommendations.note: Weak, near 52-wk low, top line flat; exit on rallies, technical bounce to ~360 possible.
recommendations.detail: Weak, exit on rallies; near 52-wk low; result only slightly better, top line flat; technical rally to ~360 possible - exit near there.

recommendations.note: Huge ~Rs 80,000 cr order book; hold/average, relief rally to 180-190 within scope.
recommendations.detail: Result not as good as expected (higher opex) but huge order book (~Rs 80,000 cr). Hold / can average; relief rally to 180-190 within scope; consolidates ~150.

recommendations.note: Very average result, travel co; speculative, exit on any rally unless tomorrow's result surprises.
recommendations.detail: Result very average, travel company -> speculative bet, exit on any rally; check tomorrow's result, hold only on a positive surprise.

recommendations.note: Demerged shares already credited; listing date not yet announced - revisit after listing.
recommendations.detail: Demerged shares already credited to accounts; listing hasn't happened, listing date not yet announced - revisit after listing.

recommendations.note: Strong business but stretched valuations; add only on dips/sharp declines, slowly.
recommendations.detail: Strong, thriving business but valuations stretched; add only on dips/sharp declines, slowly - not a buy at this price.

recommendations.note: Good result, splendid expansion; possible placement ~400 -> further appreciation possible.
recommendations.detail: Good result (+~20% since), splendid expansion plans; possible placement ~400 -> further appreciation possible.

recommendations.note: Good even at current levels for investment (not trading).
recommendations.detail: Both Natco and SMS Pharma good even at current levels, for investment not trading.

recommendations.note: Good even at current levels for investment; note result doesn't seem out yet.
recommendations.detail: Good even at current levels for investment (not trading). Note SMS Pharma's result doesn't seem to have come out yet - watch carefully.

recommendations.note: Underperforming, EPS thrust lacking; hold only with 1-yr view, else shift to GE Vernova.
recommendations.detail: Underperforming; large equity, ~20% top/bottom-line growth but EPS thrust lacking; hold only with a 1-yr view, else shift to GE Vernova (Vernova looks cheaper relatively). Stock ~650.
